10475352.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10475352.description: After the death of her husband, author Helen Bailey found happiness in a new partner. But when she disappears two years later, friends and family start to ask questions.

10476297.title: Judge Judy
10476297.description: A teen sues her boyfriend for repayment of a loan.

10476384.title: Cheaters
10476384.description: Robert Gujado gets floored by his girlfriend's infidelity, while Stacy Hammond uncovers why her boyfriend's priorities have changed as of late.

10477326.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10477326.description: Christopher Hightower was a killer conman who masqueraded as a church leader and duped people out of thousands of dollars. In 1991, the commodities trader slaughtered a family of three after his friend Ernest Brendel lodged a complaint against him.

10478247.title: Judge Judy
10478247.description: An absentee father is accused of reneging on a promise to buy his son a car for college. Then, a man sues his teen cousin for damaging his car and moving out of their apartment without notice.

10478316.title: Judge Judy
10478316.description: The plaintiff accuses a large dog of charging and attacking her. Then, a woman says her father never returned a vehicle he was supposed to be repairing for her.

10478427.title: Judge Judy
10478427.description: Teen ex-roommates dispute personal belongings being drenched in bleach, eggs and water. Then, teen lovers fight over a car loan.

10479230.title: Something's Killing Me
10479230.description: Neurologist Dr Autumn Klein collapsed and was rushed to hospital, but after three days in ICU she passed away. Doctors investigate the mysterious cause of death.

10479399.title: Operation Repo
10479399.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10480252.title: Operation Repo
10480252.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10480380.title: Judge Judy
10480380.description: Divorced parents dispute accusations of assault during a custody exchange.

10480448.title: Judge Judy
10480448.description: The defendant says he was told a trip was free, but his former friend wants him to pay his share. Then, a motorist says a woman's son caused an accident.

10481293.title: Motorbike Cops
10481293.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

10481400.title: Motorbike Cops
10481400.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

10482326.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10482326.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

10483287.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10483287.description: An adventurous pensioner is lost on Ben Nevis in a howling snow storm, and a van driver skids on black ice to end up teetering on the very edge of a motorway bridge.

10484297.title: Paranormal Survivor
10484297.description: A couple begins to witness spine-chilling apparitions in their apartment. A young woman has terrifying recurring dreams that tragically come true.

10485251.title: Judge Judy
10485251.description: A young woman says her ex-friend broke their apartment lease and never apologized, a landlady says a former tenant was a con artist and a heavy smoker and overstayed his welcome.

10485338.title: Judge Judy
10485338.description: Car-towing and storage fees, a man admits to running over a curb in a borrowed car, but denies owing for all of the repairs the owner is claiming.

10485421.title: Judge Judy
10485421.description: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a judge from New York, tackles real-life small claims cases with a no-nonsense attitude.

10487238.description: Thomas Rybinski was treated for suspected meningitis, but his condition worsened. When other patients began to have the same symptoms, doctors had to act fast to save lives.

10489192.title: Judge Judy
10489192.description: A woman sues her former boyfriend for vandalising her apartment, and a son says his father punched him in the face.

10489279.title: Judge Judy
10489279.description: Ex-lovers accuse each other of cheating and fight over unpaid bills, and a woman crashes into her neighbour's car.

10494366.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10494366.description: A look at the life and crimes of David Richard Berkowitz, also known as the Son of Sam, an American serial killer who pleaded guilty to eight separate shooting attacks that began in New York City during the summer of 1976.

10495326.title: Cheaters
10495326.description: Andrew discovers his girlfriend has set her sights on a married man.

10496296.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10496296.description: Heiress Patty Hearst becomes known for events following her 1974 kidnapping by a domestic terrorist group known as the Symbionese Liberation Army; abductee Hearst appears in a surveillance video carrying out a bank robbery in San Francisco.

10497246.title: Paranormal Survivor
10497246.description: A woman's young nephew is attacked by something horrific; a man takes a job at a restaurant with a resident ghost; a woman is stalked by an obsessive spirit with a violent streak.
